performance2026.sliderDesc: Aggregate of the four growth levers in Scenarios (Bar · Golf · Hires · Events). Dragging this slider snaps all four to the same value. Wages +10%, Fixed +10%, Drinks = 30% of bar, Hosting fixed, everything else scales.

costNotes.wagesDriven: Driven by the wage calculator below — sliders control the rate per role × 2026 hours
costNotes.fixed: Rent, rates, utilities, insurance, internet, PRS · +10% on 2025
costNotes.hostingNote: Fixed — SEO/Ads now owned by Plonk Golf

scenarios.leverNote: These four levers also drive the main 2026 Performance slider
scenarios.opexHint: (costs multiplier for the Custom card only)

social.title: Social Media Discovery
social.text: Experiential venues generate organic UGC at 5× the rate of traditional hospitality. Plonk's visual format drives free acquisition.

corporate.title: Corporate Demand
corporate.text: Post-pandemic, team-building and offsites are structural demand. City of London proximity means Plonk Borough targets this without incremental spend.

recession.title: Recession Resilience
recession.text: Domestic leisure spend is sticky. Experience venues priced below £30/head replace overseas alternatives during economic downturns.

occasions.title: Occasions & Celebrations
occasions.text: Birthday, hen and stag parties are high-value bookings with structured spend. Activity venues capture the full occasion — entry, drinks and food.

repeat.title: Repeat Visit Model
repeat.text: Multi-activity format with regular event programme drives repeat visitation. Bar-led experience venues see 2–3× the repeat rate of single-activity venues.

pricing.title: Pricing Power
pricing.text: +£1 across pool and golf at current volumes generates ~£15K incremental annual profit. Zero capex, zero churn risk at this price point.
